title: D002: Implement OpenBao deployment and secret management
summary: Review #5 fix: Added 'Max TTL' column (value 4h) to Kubernetes auth role table in openbao-bootstrap.md to match setup-auth.sh token_max_ttl=4h configuration and align with the AppRole table structure. Two review pattern files updated/created to capture the learnings.

tests_checklist.item: No code changes — documentation-only update, no tests required

code_quality_checklist.item: Documentation table column count is consistent (8 header, 8 separator, 8 per row)
Review pattern files follow established structure (Review-Area, Detection-Hint, Severity, Occurrences, sections)

security_checklist.item: No security-sensitive changes — documentation table update only

architecture_checklist.item: Documentation accurately reflects setup-auth.sh implementation (ttl=1h, token_max_ttl=4h)
Kubernetes auth table columns now consistent with AppRole auth table (both show Max TTL)

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated content — single source of truth for auth configuration
